---
title: "People"
title-block-banner: true
listing:
  - id: faculty-listing
    contents:
      - title: "劉 子昂"
        subtitle: "LIU Ziang"
        image: https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/50853393?v=4
        path: https://zi-ang-liu.github.io
        description: "Associate Professor"
    type: grid
    image-height: 150px
    grid-columns: 4
  - id: student-listing
    contents:
      - students.yml
    type: grid
    image-height: 150px
    grid-columns: 4
  - id: former-members-listing
    contents:
      - former-members.yml
    type: grid
    image-height: 150px
    grid-columns: 4
---

## 教員 | Faculty

:::{#faculty-listing}
:::

## 学生 | Students

:::{#student-listing}
:::

## 過去に在籍したメンバー

:::{#former-members-listing}
:::
